scenarios.name: oauth_native_messages_strip
notes: sub2api->gateway rewrites metadata.user_id session to a server-issued UUID-like value before CC Gateway final-output handling
gateway final persona is canonical Claude Code 2.1.175 subscription profile

scenarios.name: oauth_native_count_tokens_deferred
notes: route is explicitly deferred in first wave; no upstream request observed

scenarios.name: oauth_native_messages_sign_primary
notes: sub2api->gateway body is pre-final with no billing/CCH material
cc gateway generated billing block, cc_version suffix, CCH, canonical persona, and post-sign verifier passed before localhost upstream capture

scenarios.name: oauth_native_messages_sign_primary_opus48
notes: 2.1.175 sign-primary model shape reached localhost upstream with CC Gateway-owned billing/CCH
mock upstream shape pass does not prove real upstream entitlement

scenarios.name: oauth_native_messages_sign_primary_fable5
notes: 2.1.175 sign-primary model shape reached localhost upstream with CC Gateway-owned billing/CCH
mock upstream shape pass does not prove real upstream entitlement

scenarios.name: apikey_native_messages_strip
notes: anthropic api-key passthrough is included for /v1/messages in first wave
server-issued session mapping happens before gateway strips billing markers

scenarios.name: apikey_native_count_tokens_deferred
notes: anthropic api-key count_tokens remains deferred; no native fallback observed

scenarios.name: openai_chat_completions_to_anthropic
notes: Sub2API performs protocol conversion only; CC Gateway injects final metadata/session binding

scenarios.name: openai_responses_to_anthropic
notes: Sub2API responses conversion path leaves final metadata/session ownership to CC Gateway

scenarios.name: event_logging_v2_suppressed_local

notes: legacy telemetry is suppressed before any CC Gateway routing

scenarios.name: unknown_event_endpoint_blocked
notes: unknown event route is blocked and never reaches CC Gateway
